prompt:
A vertical 3D sales funnel structure on pure black background (#000000). The structure is centered horizontally in the image, occupying approximately 55% of canvas width and 95% of canvas height. Aspect ratio 9:16 portrait (tall vertical).

CRITICAL COLOR PALETTE — use ONLY these colors:
- Primary: rich vibrant violet (#713DFF) with lighter highlights (#C8A4FF)
- Deep shadow: dark violet (#2E1A6B)
- NO blue, NO cyan, NO green, NO orange in the funnel itself

From top to bottom:

1. TUBE + SPHERES (top 0% to 55%):
A SOLID OPAQUE vertical rectangular column. Deep violet color (#2E1A6B) with subtle lighter violet edges (#3D2580). Straight, solid, rectangular — NOT glass, NOT transparent. Width approximately 25% of canvas.

In front of the tube, exactly 4 SOLID glossy spheres centered on the vertical axis. ALL spheres are the SAME rich vibrant violet (#713DFF) with lighter violet highlights (#C8A4FF). Each has white specular highlight upper-left, darker violet shading lower-right — like polished billiard balls.

CRITICAL: Spheres DECREASE IN SIZE from top to bottom:
- Sphere 1 (top): LARGEST, approximately 22% canvas width
- Sphere 2: slightly smaller, approximately 19% canvas width
- Sphere 3: smaller, approximately 16% canvas width
- Sphere 4: SMALLEST, approximately 13% canvas width
Evenly spaced vertically within the tube.

2. FUNNEL CONE (55% to 78% height):
A solid 3D inverted cone/funnel. Same rich violet (#713DFF gradient to #2E1A6B darker at bottom). Wide opening at top (~55% canvas width), narrowing to small exit at bottom (~8%). Simple elliptical rim at top showing 3D perspective. Solid material with subtle violet shading.

3. DOWNWARD ARROW (80% to 96% height):
A LARGE solid downward-pointing arrow. Rectangular shaft (~12% canvas width) + triangular arrowhead (~30% canvas width). Same violet (#713DFF to #2E1A6B). Big and prominent.

NO TEXT. NO LABELS. NO ARROWS pointing sideways. NO LINES. ONLY the 3D violet funnel structure on pure black.

Lighting: Simple studio light from upper-left. Each sphere has clear white specular highlight. Subtle violet rim light on right edges for separation from black background.

Style: Clean 3D infographic element — like a premium Keynote/PowerPoint asset. Solid, polished, professional, modern tech brand aesthetic. NOT photorealistic, NOT abstract art. Think Stripe, Linear, or Vercel marketing asset style but in violet.
negative_prompt: text, typography, letters, words, labels, side arrows, lines, annotations, watermarks, transparent spheres, glass, frosted, translucent, colored backgrounds, white background, gray background, gradient backgrounds, multiple funnels, scattered elements, photorealistic scene, room, abstract art, cartoon, low resolution, noise, rainbow colors, multicolored spheres, blue spheres, blue tube, blue funnel, cyan, green, orange, yellow, pink spheres, red, human figures, hands, faces

settings.style: clean 3D infographic asset in MM Agency violet on pure black
settings.lighting: studio light upper-left, violet rim light right
settings.quality: solid 3D shapes in brand violet, clean edges, no text
